problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to universe, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
